EmailTemplate.name: EOI Confirmed - Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: EOI Confirmation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!RW_EOI__c.RW_Primary_First_Name__c} {!RW_EOI__c.RW_Primary_Last_Name__c},
This is with reference to your "Expression of Interest (EOI)" on {!RW_EOI__c.RW_EOI_Acknowledgement_Sent_Date_Time__c}. We are happy to inform you that your EOI has been registered in our system. You may call on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
Regards, Runwal Group
